title: Flea Treatment in Canarsie, Brooklyn | $350 – $650
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment in Canarsie, Brooklyn starting at $350. Fast, effective flea extermination for homes and apartments. Same-day service available. Call now!
intro: Dealing with a flea infestation in your Canarsie home? Best Pest Control NYC provides fast and effective flea treatment services throughout Canarsie, from the waterfront properties near Canarsie Pier to the residential neighborhoods surrounding the Belt Parkway. Our experienced technicians use proven methods to eliminate fleas at all life stages, ensuring your family and pets can live comfortably again.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Canarsie residents for years with reliable, affordable flea extermination solutions. Our local expertise means we understand the unique pest challenges in Brooklyn's coastal neighborhoods, and we offer flexible scheduling with same-day and weekend appointments to fit your busy life.
localContext: Canarsie's mix of single-family homes, apartment buildings, and proximity to Jamaica Bay creates ideal conditions for flea infestations, especially in pet-friendly households. From the garden apartments near Seaview Avenue to the homes along Paerdegat Basin, our team knows how to protect Canarsie properties from these persistent pests.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Canarsie?
faqs.answer: Flea treatment in Canarsie typically costs between $350 and $650, depending on the size of your home, severity of the infestation, and number of rooms requiring treatment. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: Most fleas are eliminated within 24-48 hours of treatment, but complete eradication including eggs and larvae can take 2-3 weeks. We typically recommend a follow-up treatment after 14 days to ensure all life stages are eliminated and prevent re-infestation.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for my pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for pets and children when applied correctly. We recommend keeping pets and family members out of treated areas for 2-4 hours after application, and our technicians will provide specific safety instructions for your situation.

faqs.question: Do I need to prepare my Canarsie home before flea treatment?
faqs.answer: Yes, preparation improves treatment effectiveness. We ask that you vacuum all carpets and upholstery, wash pet bedding, remove pet food and water bowls, and ensure pets are treated by a veterinarian. Our team will provide a complete preparation checklist when you schedule your appointment.
